question.text: A trader buys a USDINR 83 call option at Rs. 0.10 premium. At expiry USDINR is 83.50. What is the net profit per unit?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Payoff = max(83.50 - 83, 0) = 0.50. Net profit = Payoff - Premium = 0.50 - 0.10 = Rs. 0.40 per unit. **The Trap:** Rs. 0.50 is the payoff (gross), not the net profit. Always subtract the premium paid. **Cross-Exam Context:** Call option P&L calculations are tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Per lot: Rs. 0.40 × 1000 = Rs. 400 profit.
